cross_cutting_concerns.title: PA-503 + RE-501 + RE-502 + RE-503 + PA-508 compound risk when main.py is active
cross_cutting_concerns.description: SF-RE-505 confirms coordinator path (available_margin=1M) was active on 2026-05-30. When main.py path is used, ALL of the following are simultaneously dead: PTRC-Post Level 3 KS chain (RE-501) / CB cooldown + KS manual_reset (RE-502) / LatencyMonitor (RE-503) / Live anomaly detection 5 types (PA-503) / OANDA position restore (PA-508). Compound risk from main.py path selection.

cluster_summary.overall_assessment: 23 findings all confirmed. Critical claims (RE-501, RE-505, PA-501, PA-503) all verified by code and real data. RE-505 audit log analysis from 2026-05-30 quantitatively confirms coordinator.py (main.py) path was active on production day. Absence of UnifiedRunner logs for that day suggests main.py standalone production operation, potentially realizing the PA-503 detection cascade. Top priority actions: (1) Investigate RE-505 root cause via audit log PID addition + historical log check, (2) PA-501 4-line fix (flag reset in stop()), (3) RE-508 daily_reset flow full confirmation.
